function.message: No recorded message from Foundry was found in any channel transcript.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed task hint to read channel logs fully and use cast record aliases; exhausted all channel files before concluding no match.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/foundry.md defines alias `foundry`. None of the messages in any transcript under 60_outbox/channels are authored by Foundry, foundry, or an author_id tied to that entity; two calendar channels contain no messages at all.
